title: Create a new account
description: A new user can register successfully and see confirmation that the account was created.

steps.description: Fill in the account email field with a new valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same valid password
Verify account creation confirmation is visible

title: Sign in with valid credentials
description: A returning user can log in with valid credentials and enter the authenticated app.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated app is displayed

title: Upload an image for dyslexia detection and review the result
description: A signed-in user can upload an image, wait for analysis, and review the detection probability, severity, and recommendations.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Choose a valid image file for analysis
Submit the upload for dyslexia detection
Verify the analyzing state is displayed
Verify the detection result details are displayed

title: Upload an image for handwriting translation and review the result
description: A signed-in user can upload an image for translation and review the extracted source text and translated text.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Choose a valid image file for translation
Submit the upload for handwriting translation
Verify the analyzing state is displayed
Verify the translated text result is displayed

title: Change password successfully
description: An authenticated user can change their password and see a success confirmation after saving.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a password change success confirmation is visible

title: Update personal information
description: An authenticated user can update profile details and see the saved information reflected in the profile view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated profile information is displayed

title: View saved history records
description: A returning user can open history and see previously saved analyses.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify saved history records are displayed

title: Delete one history record
description: A returning user can remove a single history item and see it disappear from the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the deleted record is no longer displayed in the history list

title: Delete one saved history item
description: A returning user can delete a single history record and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the deleted item is no longer visible

title: Update personal details successfully
description: An authenticated user can edit editable personal information and see the updated profile reflected after saving.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the personal information edit page
Update the editable personal information fields with valid new values
Verify the updated personal information is displayed on the profile page

title: Generate a practice sentence from writing preferences
description: A signed-in user can set practice preferences and receive a generated sentence for writing support.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a generated practice sentence is displayed

title: Search or filter previous analyses
description: A returning user can narrow history results using the available search or filter controls.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Use the history search or filter controls
Verify the history list is filtered

title: Update address successfully
description: An authenticated user can change address details and see the saved address reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the city, postal code, or country with valid values
Verify the updated address information is displayed on the profile page

title: Update the address on profile
description: An authenticated user can update their address details and see the saved address reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated address information is displayed

title: View and filter history records
description: A returning user can open history, narrow the list with search or filters, and see matching records.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search or filter the history list using a relevant term or criteria
Verify matching history records are displayed

title: Open a saved analysis record
description: A returning user can open a history item and view its full analysis details.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the record detail view is displayed

title: View saved profile details
description: An authenticated user can open the profile page and review their saved personal information and address details.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify saved personal information is displayed
Verify saved address details are displayed

title: Reset a forgotten password
description: A user can request password recovery, verify the code, set a new password, and see reset confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the forgot password page
Fill in the account email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify password reset confirmation is visible

title: Open a history record
description: A returning user can select a history item and view its full analysis details.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a history record from the list
Verify the selected history record details are displayed

title: Clear all visible history records
description: A returning user can clear the visible history list after confirming the action and see an empty state.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the history list is emptied
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: See feedback for invalid login credentials
description: A user entering incorrect credentials sees an invalid credentials message and remains on the login form.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an invalid email
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible

title: Switch to a dyslexia-friendly reading experience
description: An authenticated user can change accessibility settings such as text size, contrast, and reading mode and see the updated experience applied.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the accessibility preferences are applied

title: Enable accessibility preferences
description: A user can turn on accessibility options and see the reading experience update to match their chosen preferences.

steps.description: Verify the interface updates to the selected accessibility preferences

title: View help content and guidance
description: Verifies that a user can open the help area and review the FAQ, usage guidance, and writing tips needed to learn the app.

steps.description: Verify the help guidance content is displayed
Verify the FAQ content is displayed
Verify the writing tips content is displayed

title: Access the photo guidance page
description: Verifies that a user can open the photo tips page and see step-by-step guidance for taking usable images.

steps.description: Click the link to view photo tips
Verify the photo guidance content is displayed
Verify step-by-step photo instructions are displayed

title: Open help and tips content
description: A user can access help content and browse guidance for using the app effectively.

steps.description: Open the help and tips section
Verify help guidance content is displayed

title: Access help content as a visitor
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated visitor can open the help area and read support content without needing to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the help guidance content is displayed
Verify the support content is available to a visitor

title: Review photo tips and templates
description: A user can open the support content for image preparation and writing templates.

steps.description: Open the photo tips or templates section
Verify photo preparation guidance is displayed
Verify template or download guidance is displayed

title: Warn when submitting analysis without a file
description: A signed-in user sees a required-file validation message when trying to upload without selecting an image.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the upload without choosing a file
Verify a file required validation message is visible

title: Download available reference material
description: Verifies that a user can access the downloadable writing support material from the help area.

steps.description: Scroll to the downloadable support material
Click the download link for the available template or reference material
Verify the downloadable support material is available from the help page

title: Review help and tips content
description: A user can open the support content area and read guidance that helps them use the app effectively.

steps.description: Open the help and tips page
Open the templates or downloads section
Verify help guidance content is displayed
Verify usage tips or downloadable resources are displayed

title: View the read-only email field in profile editing
description: An authenticated user can view their email address in profile editing but cannot modify the email field.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the email field is read only

title: Start using the app from the landing page
description: A visitor can use the landing page call to action to reach the authentication entry point.

steps.description: Click the primary call to action to begin using the app
Verify the authentication entry point is displayed

title: Keep email address read-only
description: An authenticated user cannot edit the email field on the personal information form.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the personal information edit page
Attempt to edit the email field
Verify the email field remains read-only

title: Return from photo guidance to help content
description: Verifies that a user can move from photo tips back to the main help content without losing access to support information.

steps.description: Click the link to view photo tips
Click the link to return to help content
Verify the help guidance content is displayed
Verify the photo guidance content is no longer shown

title: Review the landing page value proposition
description: A visitor can understand the product purpose and key benefits from the home page content.

steps.description: Verify the product introduction is visible
Verify the highlighted features and testimonials are visible

title: Review the medical disclaimer
description: Verifies that a user can find and read the disclaimer content from the help area.

steps.description: Verify the disclaimer content is displayed

title: Read the app disclaimer
description: A user can open the disclaimer content and review the usage limitations before continuing.
